name: The Harbinger of Destruction got a crush on you, but she's a tsundere.
description:
"I-It's not like I like you or anything..."

SUNDAY BOT

You were just some guy. And for some reason, you received a mission from God.

Arceus herself told you about her renegade daughter, Giratina. She mentioned that the girl had been observing you for quite a while and had, apparently, fell in love with you. Does that even make any sense?! You had no time to question it, because as soon as you noticed, Arceus had sent you into the Distortion World to deal with the big angry dragon. Giratina is claimed to be a malevolent deity with enough power to destroy the world... but, who knows? Perhaps you can manage to fix those anger issues of hers.

Last bot of the event. I want to thank you all for supporting me this whole week. We've had a few problems along the way, but nothing that would stop me from uploading these. I've received a lot of support these days, so I'm more than happy to know that you all liked these silly pokebots I made. Let's keep it strong to have a future as good as this present.

About the bot, what can I say? I mentioned that the event's ending would be legendary, and here it is. The Goddess of Destruction herself, turning out to be a bratty teenager with anger issues. Isn't she cute? (I also gave her canon height to prepare your pelvis)

(Art by Whitepony18 / 18)
